News

May 1, 2026 Paper accepted at ICML26!
Apr 17, 2026 Our paper Branch-and-Bound Algorithms as Polynomial-time Approximation Scheme has been accepted for publication at Mathematics of Operation Research!
Apr 10, 2026 Our paper The Integrality Gap of the Traveling Salesman Problem is 4/3 if the LP Solution Has at Most n+6 Non-zero Components has been accepted at IPCO 2026!
Jan 20, 2026 I have been invited to participate in the Dagstuhl Seminar Analysis of Algorithms Beyond the Worst Case. A big thank you to the organizers for this great opportunity!
Dec 1, 2025 The OC Group will host the EUROYoung Workshop 2026 in Lugano!
